Great Oaks Trail, Cincinnati, OH 45218, USA

The great oaks trail contains several medium sized pawpaw trees. Great fruit and large size. I collected and ate several last year. The King Fisher trail also contains some pawpaw (across the creek) Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.

The King Fisher Trail contains several medium sized pawpaw trees. Pawpaws are located along the creek between the boardwalk and the bridge (This area is sometimes muddy). Great fruit and large size. I collected and ate several last year (2018). The Great Oaks
